name: extract-rules-from-url.sh --shape free-prose segments blank-line-delimited paragraphs (ADR-0009 line 51)
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r02-$$; mkdir -p $OUT && printf 'Data MUST be encrypted at rest.

Logs SHALL be retained for 90 days.

Apps MAY use extra monitoring but SHOULD default to structured logs.
' > $OUT/s.txt; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/extract-rules-from-url.sh" --source $OUT/s.txt --shape free-prose --source-id r02 --json 2>e.err | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(len(d))' > n.out; N=$(cat n.out); grep -q 'shape=free-prose' e.err && [ "$N" = "3" ] && echo free-prose-yields-segments 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
